sequence.name: Signal Stream Active
sequence.description: Weather and traffic signals populate the feed.

sequence.name: Conflicting Intelligence Arrival
sequence.description: Unverified Telegram report regarding dam collapse enters the system.

sequence.name: Crisis Escalation
sequence.description: G-10 flood severity spikes to 87 based on sensor fusion.

sequence.name: Resource Reallocation
sequence.description: AI automatically shifts ambulances, triggering a trade-off warning.

sequence.name: Predictive Simulation
sequence.description: Before/After mitigation results rendered for Commander review.

sequence.name: Agent Trace Finalization
sequence.description: Timeline log populates showing exact agent execution metrics.

sequence.name: False Alarm Retraction
sequence.description: Verification Agent clears the conflicting signal and issues public retraction.
